channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-02
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESMA clarifies expectations in the run-up to the launch of EU’s Consolidated Tapes 01/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financia
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, has published Questions and Answers (Q&As) on the onboarding of data contributors to the EU’s Consolidated Tapes (CTs), and on the operational rules for the Consolidated Tape Providers (CTPs). The goal is to increase certainty for all market participants in anticipation of the go-live of the EU’s CTs for bonds and for equities. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: En bref. Les Gars des eaux s’associent à L’Olivier assurance - Maison Cadiou acquiert Reignoux créations - Bolloré Energy engagé sur les trains régionaux normands - Ouest-France
